title: AI-SOC Recommendation Artifact
description: Versioned, immutable artifact representing an AI-assisted analyst recommendation for a network control change. Governed by ADR-030. Canonical owner: local-ai-soc.

schema_version.description: Schema version; must match the version field of this document.

recommendation_id.description: UUID v4. Primary key for audit trail. Immutable once set.

case_id.description: UUID v4. Links this recommendation to an investigation case.

type.description: Action class. Determines which executor path the firewall uses.

target.description: The resource to act on (IP address, CIDR, hostname, port/protocol pair).

scope.description: Network scope of the action in IPFire zone notation (e.g. 'RED->GREEN', 'RED', 'ALL').

rationale.description: Human-readable reasoning chain. Each item is a discrete justification point.

evidence_event_ids.description: Event IDs (from NormalizedEvent store) that ground the recommendation.

ids.description: Chroma document IDs of the retrieved chunks.

retrieval_sources.description: RAG retrieval audit. count=0 and ids=[] means no retrieval was performed.

inference_confidence.description: Model self-assessed confidence. Computed by confidence scoring (Phase 22-02). 'none' means the model could not produce a confidence estimate.

model_id.description: Ollama model identifier (e.g. 'qwen3:14b', 'foundation-sec:8b'). Must match the active model at generation time.

model_run_id.description: Links to llm_audit_provenance table (Phase 22+). For artifacts created before Phase 22, use sentinel value 'pre-phase-22-no-audit'. Migration: populate from llm_calls.run_id.

method.description: Inspection algorithm version string (e.g. 'pattern_scrub_v2'). Use 'unavailable' if method could not run.

passed.description: True if inspection ran and found no issues. Must be false if method='unavailable'.

flagged_patterns.description: Patterns matched during inspection. Empty array when passed=true.

audit_log_id.description: UUID v4 linking to the prompt inspection audit log row.

prompt_inspection.description: Structured prompt injection inspection record. Boolean alone is insufficient for audit evidence (ADR-030 §3).

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of artifact generation.

analyst_approved.description: Must be true before the artifact is dispatched to the firewall. Set by the approval gate, never by the AI.

approved_by.description: Operator identifier. Required when analyst_approved=true. Must be non-empty at dispatch time.

approved_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of analyst approval decision.

approval_basis.description: Free-text: why the analyst approved despite low confidence or failed inspection.

modified_fields.description: Recommendation fields the analyst modified before approval. Empty means AI output accepted as-is.

operator_note.description: Optional operator note for audit log.

override_log.description: Required when inference_confidence is 'low' or 'none', or prompt_inspection.passed is false (ADR-030 §4).

expires_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC. Firewall executor MUST reject artifacts presented after this timestamp. Typically 7 days from generated_at.

override_log.description: Required when inference_confidence is low/none or prompt_inspection failed
